positive: Minimalist celestial fauna pattern, featuring highly stylized hummingbirds and crescent moons intertwined with delicate astronomical elements like orbits and constellations. The design must have clean, thick silhouettes and strong, immediate contrast. Style is modern folk art combined with Art Deco symmetry. Palette should be deep indigo, burnt orange, and off-white, suitable for screen printing on fabric. Central composition, perfect for a repeating textile pattern. Isolated elements on a clean background.
